text:
---

## Wave 1 Complete — Milestone v28-human-run-uat Done

**Progress: 2/2 released**

| Feature | Status |
|---|---|
| `human-uat-backend` | released |
| `human-uat-frontend` | released |

### What shipped

**Backend** (`human-uat-backend`):
- `UatRunMode` enum (`Agent` | `Human`) on `UatRun` — backward-compatible serde default
- `POST /api/milestone/{slug}/uat/human` — accepts verdict/notes, writes summary, emits SSE
- `POST /api/features/{slug}/human-qa` — drafts `qa_results` artifact for human submission
- 5 new integration tests, all passing

**Frontend** (`human-uat-frontend`):
- `HumanUatModal.tsx` — checklist fetch, Pass/Pass-with-Tasks/Fail verdict, notes validation, spinner
- "Submit manually" link in `MilestonePreparePanel` (verifying state, no active run)
- "Submit manually" ghost button in `FeatureDetail` action card (run_qa action)
- 3 new API helpers in `client.ts`

No more waves — all features released. The milestone is ready for UAT.
